trust.about.sections.0.points.0.defaultMessage: OTP login protections with lockout, purpose checks, and anti-replay controls.

trust.about.sections.0.points.1.defaultMessage: Server-authoritative checkout and pricing validation before order confirmation.

trust.about.sections.0.points.2.defaultMessage: Idempotent payment and order operations to protect from duplicate processing.

trust.about.sections.1.points.0.defaultMessage: Durable order email queue with retries and failure audit trails.

trust.about.sections.1.points.1.defaultMessage: Payment lifecycle tracking with reconciliation-ready event states.

trust.about.sections.1.points.2.defaultMessage: Continuous monitoring via service health checks and platform telemetry.

trust.about.summary.defaultMessage: Aura combines marketplace speed with security-first controls across login, payments, and orders.

trust.careers.sections.0.points.2.defaultMessage: Marketplace policy enforcement and abuse detection

trust.careers.sections.1.points.0.defaultMessage: Strong systems thinking and operational discipline

trust.careers.sections.1.points.1.defaultMessage: Secure coding and incident response readiness

trust.careers.sections.1.points.2.defaultMessage: Ownership mindset for reliability and customer trust

trust.careers.summary.defaultMessage: Help build resilient commerce systems focused on trust, safety, and scale.

trust.careers.title.defaultMessage: Careers in Security and Platform Engineering

trust.contact.sections.0.points.0.defaultMessage: Report account takeover, suspicious OTP, or payment concerns immediately.

trust.contact.sections.0.points.1.defaultMessage: High-priority incidents are triaged continuously by the security support channel.

trust.contact.sections.0.points.2.defaultMessage: Use only official Aura channels listed here. We never ask OTP in chat or calls.

trust.contact.summary.defaultMessage: Reach the right team quickly for account security, order help, and marketplace issues.

trust.corporate.summary.defaultMessage: Organizational and compliance information supporting platform trust.

trust.epr.sections.0.points.2.defaultMessage: Program updates reflected in legal and compliance content.

trust.epr.summary.defaultMessage: Environmental responsibility and compliance orientation for marketplace operations.

trust.faq.sections.0.points.0.defaultMessage: Why did I receive an OTP email?

trust.faq.sections.0.points.1.defaultMessage: How do I secure my account if OTP was not requested by me?

trust.faq.sections.0.points.2.defaultMessage: How do payment retries and fallback options work?

trust.faq.summary.defaultMessage: Fast answers for account, checkout, payment, and security questions.

trust.payments.sections.0.points.0.defaultMessage: Server-side amount validation before order acceptance.

trust.payments.sections.0.points.1.defaultMessage: Risk-aware payment controls and challenge support paths.

trust.payments.sections.0.points.2.defaultMessage: Retry-safe idempotency protections on critical payment mutations.

trust.payments.sections.1.points.1.defaultMessage: Operational handling for failures, pending states, and retries.

trust.payments.summary.defaultMessage: How Aura protects digital payment flows and fallback options.

trust.press.sections.0.points.0.defaultMessage: Use only verified Aura channels for public statements.

trust.press.sections.0.points.1.defaultMessage: Security incident updates are communicated with validated timelines.

trust.press.sections.0.points.2.defaultMessage: Customer protection guidance is prioritized in all advisories.

trust.press.summary.defaultMessage: Official notices related to platform trust, compliance, and policy updates.

trust.privacy.sections.0.points.0.defaultMessage: Data is processed for account security, transaction reliability, and support.

trust.privacy.sections.0.points.1.defaultMessage: Sensitive fields are restricted from standard responses and logs.

trust.privacy.sections.0.points.2.defaultMessage: Operational events are retained for audit and abuse prevention.

trust.privacy.summary.defaultMessage: How Aura handles account and transaction data with security and purpose limits.

trust.report.sections.0.points.0.defaultMessage: Listing links, order references, and timestamps.

trust.report.sections.0.points.2.defaultMessage: Contact details for follow-up if required.

trust.report.summary.defaultMessage: Report policy violations, abuse, or suspicious marketplace activity.

trust.return-policy.sections.0.points.0.defaultMessage: Item condition and category rules determine eligibility.

trust.return-policy.sections.0.points.1.defaultMessage: Time-bound windows are enforced by order state.

trust.return-policy.sections.0.points.2.defaultMessage: Certain categories may have non-returnable constraints.

trust.return-policy.summary.defaultMessage: Customer-friendly return guidance with consistency and compliance controls.

trust.returns.sections.0.points.0.defaultMessage: Return eligibility depends on category and order state.

trust.returns.sections.0.points.1.defaultMessage: Cancellation windows are visible in order workflows.

trust.returns.sections.0.points.2.defaultMessage: Refund operations follow controlled payment-state transitions.

trust.returns.summary.defaultMessage: Return windows, cancellation behavior, and refund processing posture.

trust.security.sections.0.points.0.defaultMessage: OTP checks include purpose validation, expiry windows, and anti-replay handling.

trust.security.sections.0.points.1.defaultMessage: Failed attempts trigger lockouts to reduce brute-force risk.

trust.security.sections.0.points.2.defaultMessage: Security notifications include request context and anti-phishing guidance.

trust.security.sections.1.points.0.defaultMessage: Pricing and totals are validated server-side before order creation.

trust.security.sections.1.points.1.defaultMessage: Payment state is controlled by backend validations and idempotent operations.

trust.security.sections.1.points.2.defaultMessage: Order confirmation email delivery uses durable retry-safe processing.

trust.security.sections.2.points.0.defaultMessage: Never share OTP codes with anyone.

trust.security.sections.2.points.1.defaultMessage: Reset your password immediately if you detect suspicious activity.

trust.security.sections.2.points.2.defaultMessage: Use only official Aura support channels.

trust.security.summary.defaultMessage: Aura security controls for account integrity, payments, and communications.

trust.shipping.sections.0.points.0.defaultMessage: Delivery options are validated during checkout quote.

trust.shipping.sections.0.points.1.defaultMessage: Address and slot selections are normalized server-side.

trust.shipping.sections.0.points.2.defaultMessage: Post-order tracking visibility is surfaced in order timelines.

trust.shipping.summary.defaultMessage: Delivery promises, slot behavior, and reliability expectations.

trust.sitemap.summary.defaultMessage: Quick links to key marketplace, account, and trust destinations.

trust.stories.sections.0.points.0.defaultMessage: OTP email hardening and fail-closed delivery behavior.

trust.stories.sections.0.points.1.defaultMessage: Payment security integration with risk controls and audit trails.

trust.stories.sections.0.points.2.defaultMessage: Checkout reliability improvements with backend-authoritative quotes.

trust.stories.summary.defaultMessage: Read how the platform ships security upgrades and customer safeguards.

trust.terms.sections.0.points.0.defaultMessage: Use the platform only through authorized and lawful behavior.

trust.terms.sections.0.points.1.defaultMessage: Do not attempt fraud, account abuse, or data misuse.

trust.terms.sections.0.points.2.defaultMessage: Transactions are governed by checkout, payment, and policy controls.

trust.terms.summary.defaultMessage: Platform terms for account usage, transactions, and marketplace conduct.
